overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist walking along a futuristic illuminated highway at night. The character traverses a moody, stormy landscape with artificial lighting, encounters a holographic memory figure, and passes holographic signage while navigating through mountainous terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic illuminated highway with holographic signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved road toward a distant holographic figure visible ahead

entered.detail: tall curved street lamps with bright white lights lining both sides of the road
blue glowing holographic text projection on the ground reading ENERGY ZONE
dark silhouetted mountains against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, stormy night along a futuristic highway. The character walks steadily forward along the asphalt road, passing blue holographic ENERGY ZONE signs projected on the ground. Tall curved street lamps with bright white lights line both sides of the path, illuminating the way toward distant mountains.

events.description: approaches and observes a stationary holographic figure of a soldier or astronaut
passes the holographic figure and continues forward along the road

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a holographic memory figure standing beside a tall cylindrical structure with blue lighting

notable_agents.action: stationary holographic projection of a white-armored soldier figure emitting soft white light

entered.detail: tall dark cylindrical tower with blue neon ring lighting near the top
semi-transparent white hologram of a soldier or astronaut standing motionless

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a roadside memorial featuring a tall black cylindrical structure with blue lighting. A glowing white holographic figure of a soldier stands motionless beside it. The character slows to observe the projection before walking past it and continuing down the road.

events.description: lightning flash briefly illuminates the storm clouds overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the gently curved road away from the holographic figure, heading toward distant lights

entered.detail: cluster of small lights from a distant settlement or facility visible down the road

segments.scene_description: Having passed the holographic memorial, the character continues along the winding highway. The road stretches toward a distant settlement with visible lights. Around the 24-second mark, a lightning flash briefly illuminates the stormy sky overhead, adding to the atmospheric tension of the dark landscape.

events.description: character turns left at a bend in the road

agents.ego_description: turning left at a bend in the road, passing an abandoned red vehicle on the left side

entered.detail: derelict red car or truck abandoned on the left roadside

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a left turn along the highway curve, passing an abandoned red vehicle on the roadside. The street lamps continue to line the path as the terrain opens up, with mountains visible in the background. The segment concludes with the character continuing forward along the newly oriented road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a futuristic highway at night, moving from a structured corridor of light toward an expansive, stormy mountain landscape. It begins with the character walking past blue holographic energy signs under the glow of tall, curved street lamps that carve a path through the darkness. As the camera advances, the scene shifts toward a roadside memorial where a motionless, glowing white holographic soldier stands beside a black cylindrical structure. The path then winds further into the storm, with a sudden flash of lightning illuminating the dark sky and distant settlement lights before the camera follows a left turn past an abandoned red vehicle. Finally, the terrain opens up to reveal towering mountains in the background as the character continues forward along the newly oriented road.
